Who We Are

PCB testing built on precision infrastructure

Accurex Lab Solutions LLP is an independent PCB testing and inspection laboratory serving manufacturers, EMS providers and OEMs.

Equipped with state-of-the-art testing infrastructure and driven by experienced professionals, we deliver comprehensive PCB testing, inspection and verification — ensuring every board meets the highest standards of quality, compliance and performance.

  • ✓ Independent, unbiased third-party evaluation
  • ✓ Advanced laboratory infrastructure
  • ✓ IPC-aligned testing methodologies
  • ✓ Fast turnaround with clear, comprehensive reporting

Home / About

About Accurex Lab Solutions

An independent PCB testing and inspection laboratory built on technical excellence, advanced infrastructure, and a simple commitment: Test | Verify | Trust.

Our Story

Engineering confidence into every board

Through advanced testing methodologies and technical excellence, we ensure product reliability, manufacturing consistency, regulatory compliance and lasting customer confidence.

Equipped with state-of-the-art testing infrastructure and driven by experienced professionals, Accurex Lab Solutions LLP delivers comprehensive PCB testing, inspection and verification services to manufacturers, electronics companies and OEMs across India.

◎

Mission

To deliver accurate, reliable and independent PCB testing that gives manufacturers absolute confidence in the boards they ship.

◈

Vision

To be India's most trusted independent PCB testing laboratory — the reference standard for quality verification.

◆

Core Values

Precision, independence, integrity and transparency in every test, every report, every client relationship.

IPC
Standards
Aligned Methodology
Advanced Laboratory

Infrastructure built for precision

Our laboratory is equipped with microsectioning, grinding & polishing, coupon-cutting, and inspection systems calibrated for consistent, defensible results.

  • ✓ Calibrated microscopy & inspection stations
  • ✓ Controlled sample preparation environment
  • ✓ Documented, traceable test procedures
Technical Expertise

A team built around the discipline of testing

Experienced Engineers

Specialists trained specifically in PCB inspection and failure analysis.

IPC-Aligned Process

Testing methodologies mapped to recognised IPC quality requirements.

Clear Reporting

Reports built for engineers — direct, data-backed, and easy to act on.

Fast Turnaround

Responsive scheduling so testing never becomes your bottleneck.
